Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 52 50 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}This is Mitsuru. We've neutralized the target.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 52 50 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}We ran into some interference during the mission. It seems they were Persona-users.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 52 50 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}They appeared during the Dark Hour, and seemed to know who we were.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}Did they say anything that might give us a hint to who they are?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}All right, I'll see what I can find out.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 52 50 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}There's... one other thing I have to report.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 3 52 50 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 18 0 0}We unfortunately fell into Strega's trap, so we're locked inside the facility.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}Since the threat has been eliminated, I'll send someone over as soon as I can.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 3 52 50 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 21 0 0}I'm sorry for the trouble. We'll be waiting.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}They seem to be Persona-users as well.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}But we still succeeded in defeating[n]the Shadows this month.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}There should be fewer[n]victims for a while.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I'm exhausted... I can't[n]wait to get some rest.[n]{f 1 1}
